ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sensor station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sensor station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the sensor station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the sensor station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sensor station above sea level */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used (e.g., PM2.5 sensor, PM10 sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor station was installed */,
  "installation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the installation process */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor station was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_details" TEXT /* Details about the calibration process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of maintenance in days */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sensor station that recorded the data */,
  "pm25" REAL /* Particulate matter concentration (PM2.5) in µg/m³ */,
  "pm10" REAL /* Particulate matter concentration (PM10) in µg/m³ */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "co" REAL /* Carbon monoxide concentration in ppm */,
  "no2" REAL /* Nitrogen dioxide concentration in ppb */,
  "o3" REAL /* Ozone concentration in ppb */,
  "so2" REAL /* Sulfur dioxide concentration in ppb */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., valid, questionable, invalid) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES sensor_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for contact */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is granted by default to new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning this permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission granted to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the permission */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sensor station that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance performed */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES sensor_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., API, CSV, Database) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint or path to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "last_check" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last checked */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_import_logs" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data import occurred */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the import failed */,
  "import_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the import process in seconds */,
  "data_volume" REAL /* Volume of data imported in MB */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "import_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., air quality, maintenance) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report was shared with */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
